message:
feat(tui): wire ConfirmThenExecute callback through deferred dispatch with full lifecycle tests (br-1xt0m.1.6.2)

Add confirm_then_execute_lifecycle test validating modal→callback→deferred
→drain→dispatch pipeline. Make deferred action tests poison-safe for parallel
execution. Existing ConfirmThenExecute handler already stores (operation,
context) in DEFERRED_CONFIRMED_ACTION on OK, which tick drains via
dispatch_execute_operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
